comps.name: Samira Two Tanky
tips: Ideally open with early Samira / Ornn to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Samira / Ornn.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Blitz>2nd Nunu>Nasus.

comps.name: Gnar Printer
tips: Play around early Gnar and 3 Meeple with slammed bow items for win streak. Tank Poppy until you find Rammus.
Roll some on 6 for Gnar 2 + 3 Timebreakers to stabilize. Gnar 2 should be strong enough to win streak. Hold every Meeple to get 7 Meeple on level 8.
Print Gnar 3 with 7 Meeple on level 8 and look for upgraded frontline. Once you get Gnar 3, drop down to 5 Meeple for better board quality. Go 9 for 5 costs.

comps.name: Samira Ornn
tips: Ideally open with early Samira / Ornn to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Samira / Ornn.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll on Level 7 for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Karma.

comps.name: Dark Star Flex
tips: Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker that fit in Dark Star naturally. Slam items for Kai'Sa / Jhin and push levels.
Level for more frontline / Dark Star as needed. 6 Dark Star is the big spike if you have emblem. You can flex in Voyager and Shepherd easily too.

If you have extra rerolls / paired on 3 costs, consider rolling on 7 before going to 8 for Kai'Sa 2. Illaoi 2 is the cheapest tank to push for level 9 but can also tank Mighty Mech / Nunu / TK. Once stable, skip 8 to go 9.

comps.name: Self Destruct Gragas
tips: Get Gragas online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Gragas and activate traits (4 Brawler + Psionic. Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Gragas.
Finish Gragas and push levels. Ideally tank Tahm 2 but you can use any upgraded Brawler. Cap with 6 Brawler / 4 Psionic. Before level 9, can run 4 Brawlers 4 Psyonic with Karma backline.

comps.name: Vanguard Teemo
tips: Don't level early at all. Play around early Teemo 2 and Leona. If you're lose streaking, you can play an econ engine.
Slow roll for Teemo 3 and Leona 3. Nasus 3 is luxury. Aim for 4 Vanguard and 3 Shepherd. If behind, consider taking an econ God blessing to hit faster.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 4 Vanguard + Nami or Leblanc. 6 Vanguard is good but only fits on 9 or if you have emblem.

comps.name: Bonk! Nasus
tips: Prioritize Nasus BIS and aim for a win streak if possible while farming kills for his permanent scaling. Aim for a Vanguard / Space Groove mix of units.
Slow roll for Nasus 3. Leona 3 and Teemo 3 are luxury. If you highroll Leblanc early and are behind in Teemo count, consider carrying her instead.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 6 Vanguard. You can flex in 5 Space Groove, Zoe, or a support 5 cost until you hit Blitzcrank.

comps.name: Lulu Reroll
tips: Ideally open with early Lulu to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Lulu / tank.
Level to 6 at 3-2 and roll for 2* item holders. Try to win most of the fights on stage and econ up.
Slow roll for 3* Lulu. You should be hitting end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Rhaast.

comps.name: In The Groove
tips: Play around upgraded Teemo and Nasus opener. Slam items on Teemo for Nami. Tank items on Nasus are also important.
Add more Space Groove as you get them. Mix in Vanguards, Shepherd, Dark Star, as needed. Save econ and get ready for level 8 rolldown.
Level to 8 and roll down for Nami 2, Riven, and 5 Space Groove. Look for either Kench 2 (best) or Rammus 2 or Nunu 2 as your frontline.

comps.name: Xayah Stargazer
tips: Play for win streak with Stargazers or an econ trait like Primordian. Talon and Bel'Veth are solid holders for Xayah items.
If win streaking, prioritize playing strongest board over greeding econ traits. Upgraded 2 and 3 costs are often better than 1* high tier units here.
Level to 8 and roll for Xayah 2 + upgraded frontline. Play Samira until Jhin. If you miss Tahm Kench, play another Vanguard for Nunu tank instead.

comps.name: Viktor Nami
tips: Ideally open with Viktor with Drone or a strong AP opener. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Arbiter > Primordian. Slam items for Viktor.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
If uncontested, roll on 7. Otherwise, level to 8 and look for Viktor 2 with upgraded frontline. When stable, go 9 for Bard and 5 costs.

comps.name: Vanguard Diana
tips: Ideally open with Arbiter to begin stacking Diana. Slam items to start gaining permanent HP stacks for her. Can also lose streak Anima but it's riskier.
Look for an econ augment if you don't have one already. If win streaking, play for 3-7 Level 7. If lose streaking / playing Anima, level at 3-5 and roll for 2*.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for any 5 cost.

comps.name: Dianima Reroll
tips: Ideally open with Anima to begin lose streak. Be careful about slamming items and being too strong. Position poorly if needed to guarantee losses.
Aim for 300-400 minimum cash out. Level to 7 and roll for 2* 3 costs. Aim to stabilize with at least 2 lives. If you need time to transition, roll during PvE rounds.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for any 5 cost.

comps.name: Challenger Miss Fortune
tips: Ideally open with Miss Fortune + Primordian and win streak. Slam items for MF / Bel'Veth.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Kindred, Diana, or Akali for precision.

comps.name: Veigar Printer
tips: Play around early Veigar 2 with slammed AP items for win streak. If rerolling, don't level at all.
If rerolling, slow roll above 50g for Veigar, Poppy, and Lissandra. If tempoing, level for 5 Meeple + Bastion. Rush 7 Meeple if you have emblem.
Print Veigar 3 and look for Rammus 2. Play Rhaast until Bard. Itemize Rammus 2* instead of Poppy 3*

comps.name: Fateweaver Reroll
tips: Don't level early at all. Play around early Twisted Fate with AP items. Focus on Twisted + Jax items. Can also have Talon hold items if he's your only upgrade.
Slow roll above 50g for 3*. Prioritize Twisted Fate > Jax > Caitlyn / Talon > Aatrox as the priority for 3*. Jax 2 is better than Aatrox 3.
Finish your 3* then level for 4 Fateweaver or Gwen/Rhaast. If very rich with resources, you can chase Corki 2 with items.

comps.name: Yi Marawlers
tips: Best played from high tempo + econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker. Slam items on Bel'Veth or Briar as an item holder.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around 4 Brawler + Marauder + NOVA. Master Yi 1 can immediately go in with items.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until Master Yi 2 with upgraded Brawlers. Kindred takes leftover bow items. Fiora takes leftover fighter items.

comps.name: Dark Star Lissandra
tips: Play around early Lissandra 2 with slammed AP items for win streak. Don't level at all and focus on making econ intervals.
Slow roll above 50g for Lissandra and Cho 3. If you hit Lissandra 3 quickly and have low copies of Cho, push levels and play for a different tank. Finish Liss items ASAP.
Level for more Dark Stars. You will commonly play 4 Dark Star + Illaoi + Meepsie until Jhin. Karma can take leftover AP items.

comps.name: AP Shepherd 9-5
tips: Play a standard AP win streak board around Vanguards. Take econ/item augments if you can.
Continue leveling and win streaking. Look for upgraded 2 and 3 cost units to hold items. Vanguards and Shepherds is a good core to play towards.

If far ahead in HP / win streaking, you can sac Stage 4 with Timebreaker for rerolls. Otherwise, roll on 8 to stabilize first. At 9, always prioritize itemizing whichever upgraded units you hit first.

comps.name: AP Asol Flex
tips: Play around early Vanguard AP opener, preferably with Zoe as the item holder. Slam items for Asol > Tank.
Look for 4 Vanguard and 3 Shepherd as your core. Zoe 2 should still be best item holder but you can also play around early Nami / Karma.

Be highly flexible on your level 8 rolldown and prioritize upgraded frontline + Asol. If you are gold poor, take an econ augment to hit. Once stable, go 9 for 5 costs. Can replace Asol with Bard 2 to fully cap out.

comps.name: Heat Death Mordekaiser
tips: Get Morde online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Mordekaiser and activate traits (Dark Star + Vanguard + Shepherd). Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Morde.
Finish Morde 3 and push levels. Ideally tank Illaoi 3, but if it's contested just push for 6 Dark Star ASAP.

comps.name: Carrier Asol
tips: Most common Mecha line will be lose streak to guarantee items. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian > Arbiter.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler and Voyager. Always play Asol and transfer items.
Level to 8 and roll hard. Don't push for 9 until you hit 2* Mecha units Look for Akali + Maokai until Fiora + Tahm Kench. Karma + Jhin can go in level 8/9 flexibly.

comps.name: Shepherd Pie
tips: Play around early Arbiter AP win streak. If you take econ Arbiter, ditch it late game for a better tank option.
Level for 5 Shepherd when possible with Vanguards. Focus on econ management while preserving HP because we will roll heavily on level 8.
Level and roll for 5 Shepherd + Vanguard frontline. If you don't hit Sona and you have strong AP Arbiter, keep Zoe in. Otherwise, flex in a duo carry like Karma or Bard.

comps.name: NOVA Vex 9-5
tips: Play a standard win streak AD opener with slammed items related to Graves / Vex. Save 1 Akali and 1 Aatrox while on streak if possible.
If you snap win streak early Stage 3, abandon Fast 9 and pivot to another line. Early Graves Stage 3 = pivot immediately towards him.
You should be healthy (80+ HP) -> you can lose all Stage 4 and econ heavily (take econ augment) to go level 9. If you still don't have items for Graves, carry with another 5 cost with Vex.

comps.name: Mountain Stargazer
tips: Always keep at least 3 Stargazer in for the Emblem. Look for a Rageblade start on Twisted Fate 2 or Riven items on Talon 2.
Add more Stargazers as you level. Tech in Timebreaker when you can. The 1 cost carries fall off by end of Stage 3 so expect losses or transition to higher tier carries.
Level to 8 and roll for Riven, Nunu, and Xayah. Always play Shen. Once you hit at least 2 of the 3 units, you can consider pushing to 9.

comps.name: Conduit Reroll
tips: Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Conduits to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Arbiter > Primordian.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Bard / Conduit.

comps.name: Jinx Pyke
tips: Play around early Pyke and Gragas with items and look to win streak. Prioritize 3 items on 1 carry + tank items instead of spreading out items.
Level to 6 and roll for upgrades. The goal is to win streak all of Stage 3. Look for Bel'veth, Akali, and Meepsie as temporary fillers for traits.
Finish your 3* then level for Rhaast and 4 costs. You likely won't make it to level 9 so it's okay to roll on level 7 / 8 for upgrades.

comps.name: Gwen Pyke Reroll
tips: If you have Two Much Value, level immediately and start collecting 2 free rerolls per turn. Look for Milio and Pantheon for max value. Slam items on Pyke / Gwen.
Level to 6 and play all 2 costs. Roll until you have upgrades to win streak Stage 3. Finish Pyke and tank items.
Finish your 3* then level for Riven. If you are win streaking hard, push to 9. Otherwise, roll hard on 8 for the rest of the game for 5 costs.

comps.name: Contract Killer Pyke
tips: Get Pyke online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Level to 6 and roll for 2* Pyke and Gragas 2*. Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Pyke. Flex in Voyagers and Brawlers as needed.
Finish your 3* then push levels for 4 Psionic and Voyagers. If you have Gragas 3, always play 2 Brawler. Sona / Karma with items cap the board.

comps.name: Jinx Challengers
tips: Ideally play win streak with early Primordian to get econ. Prioritize 3 items on either Jinx / Bel'Veth for now (don't spread them out).
Level to 6 and roll for upgrades on your 2 costs / item holders. The goal is to win streak Stage 3. You can stay on Primordian if they are your only upgrades.
Slow roll above 50g. Don't move up to 7 until you get at least Jax and Jinx to 3. On 7 add Kindred. On 8 add Rhaast.

comps.name: Voyager Crab
tips: Try to play this comp with lots of econ on 2-1 lose-streaking or with early Urgot drop + pair with Timebreaker / Primordian opener.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Roll until you hit 2 stars for all the 3 cost units and then slowroll above 50. On level 8, transform Mighty Mech or slot in a 5 cost.

comps.name: Stellar Combo Aatrox
tips: Prioritize Aatrox BIS and aim for a win streak if possible, but don't level early. Aim for a NOVA + Bastion set up.
Slow roll for Aatrox 3 and the other 1 costs. You often can't roll for every 3* at the same time due to bench space so prioritize units you can itemize.
Aim to level to 8 and finish rolling down for your 4 costs, can aim to go 9 if board is mostly upgraded. Can play Ornn before hitting Shen.

comps.name: Brawler Miss Fortune
tips: Ideally open with Miss Fortune + Primordian and win streak. Slam items for MF and tank.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
If rich and uncontested, slow roll on 7 for 3* carries. Otherwise, level to 8 and look for your 4 costs (TK and Kindred) then finish your 3* on level 8.

comps.name: Corki Riven
tips: Play for a win streak around Meeple and Snipers. Slam items for Corki and Rammus first. Riven often takes leftover so don't prioritize too heavily.
Level for more frontline / Meeple as needed. Add in Timebreaker if possible to farm resources. Finish your tank items before prioritizing full Corki + RIven items.
Level to 8 and roll for Corki 2, Rammus 2, and Riven. Once stable, push for level 9 OR roll for 3* 4 cost

comps.name: NOVA Marauders
tips: Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker. Slam items on Bel'Veth or Akali as an item holder.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler / NOVA frontline. Kindred 1 can go in immediately.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until Kindred 2 / Tahm 2. Once stable, push levels for 5 costs.

comps.name: Mechgana
tips: Most common Mecha line will be lose streak to guarantee items. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian > Arbiter.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler and Voyager. Always play Asol and transfer items.
Level to 8 and roll hard. Don't push for 9 until you hit 2* Mecha units. Nunu can be played until you find Blitzcrank.

comps.name: Primordian Reroll
tips: Field 3 Primordian and start collecting Primordians. Early game you can solo frontline Briar in top corner when you have Rogue activated.
Slow roll on 5 for Primordian units and Cho 3 if very rich. Finish items for Briar, Rek'Sai, and Bel'Veth. If Briar solo frontline is falling off, change to default melee positioning.
Finish your 3* then push levels for Rhaast / Kindred. Kai'sa takes any leftover items (can also hold Sunder / Anti-heal items). If no Cho 3, cap with Jhin instead.

comps.name: EZ CHO
tips: Don't level early at all. Play around early Cho'Gath and a 1 cost carry. Focus on finishing Cho'Gath tank and Ezreal with leftover Sword items.
Slow roll above 50g for Ezreal and Cho'Gath. Look for 4 Brawler + Ezreal on 5. Sniper is not important for Ezreal until later. Always play TK if you highroll him.
Finish your 3* then level for traits. Put Sunder/Anti-heal on tankiest 2nd Brawler or Xayah / Kai'sa. Cap with Jhin.

comps.name: KarNami Flex
tips: Ideally open with a strong AP opener based on Vanguard frontline. Econ engines are also strong: Arbiter > Timebreaker > Primordian.
Keep your tempo high with 4 Vanguard + carry and win Stage 3. Because the composition is flexible, pretty much every AP item can be justified.
Fast 8 and look for Karma and Nami with upgraded frontline. 4 Vanguard is the most common setup, but be flexible. Once stable, go 9 for Bard and 5 costs.

comps.name: Vanguard Zoe
tips: Ideally play around early Zoe and Leona and win streak. Slam items on Zoe and Leona as you get them.
Level to 6 and roll for 4 Vanguard + 3 Shepherd. You can also play 3 Arbiter with Diana temporarily. Always go for 3* Leona at lvl 6.
Finish your 3* then level for the 4 costs and more legendaries.

comps.name: N.O.V.A Kindred
tips: Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker. Slam items on Caitlyn as an item holder for Kindred.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler / NOVA frontline. Kindred 1 can go in immediately.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until Kindred 2 / Tahm 2. Once stable, push levels for 5 costs.

comps.name: Anima Melee 9-5
tips: Ideally open with Anima to begin lose streak. Be careful about slamming items and being too strong. Position poorly if needed to guarantee losses.
Push the limit and go for 500+ cash out because you can get Fiora 2 with items. BUT make sure to have at least 2 lives. If you need time to transition, roll during PvE rounds.
If successful, you should be so strong on Stage 4, you don't need to roll much and can push directly to 9. However, be careful because level 8 players may take your 4 cost tanks.

comps.name: Invader Zed
tips: Play a standard win streak tempo opener. You can't aim to play this comp unless you specifically hit Zed's augments.
Build Zed items ASAP: Edge of Night > Shojin. Slam items on anyone to preserve HP while focusing on econ. We will be rolling hard on level 8.
Level to 8 and look for a 4 cost tank. Zed has no traits so be very flexible with front line / back line. Some ideas: 4 Bastions + Zed, NOVA + Rhaast/Morgana + Zed.

comps.name: Termeepnal Velocity Poppy
tips: Get Poppy online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. We are getting poppy 3 with 7 meeple print later so just push levels as standard.
Level for 5 Meeple + Bastions. Hold at least 1 copy of Meeple so you can get in 7 ASAP. It is worth leveling early (Stage 3-5) for 7 Meeple if you have it.
Level to 8 and roll for 1 Rammus and Corki to get 7 Meeple. Play Mighty Mech + Meepsie on 8 before you hit Bard. Blitz Morde on 9. Rhaast on 10.

comps.name: Dark Star Snipers
tips: Look for an econ engine like Primordian or Timebreaker that fit in Dark Star naturally. Slam items for Karma / Jhin and push levels.
Level for more frontline / Dark Star as needed. 6 Dark Star is the big spike if you have emblem. You can flex in Voyager and Psionic easily too.
Level to 8 and roll down for 6 Dark Star. Always play Jhin ASAP. If Nunu is hard to hit, tank TK instead and don't prioritize Stargazers.

comps.name: Shepherd Kai'Sa
tips: Ideally open with Kai'Sa and Primordian. Otherwise, any generic AD item holder will do (Ezreal 2, Talon 2, etc). Slam items for Kai'Sa.
Maintain your winstreak if possible. If playing Primordian, look for Dark Star and Brawler splash. Can also look to flex in Shepherd and Vanguards.
If chasing 3*, slow roll on level 7 above 50g. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. Leftover AP items on Karma.

comps.name: Riven Yi Flex
tips: Look for an econ engine: Primordian > Timebreaker. Slam items for Yi or tank. Put items on Briar until you get Belveth 2 from Primordian.
Standard level 6 and 7 intervals (3-2 / 3-5 if streaking). Play around Brawler frontline. Yi 1 can go in immediately if frontline is upgraded and itemized.
Level to 8 at a natural interval and roll until stable. Kench will drop tailored units so it's possible to stay high gold until oracle procs to wait for upgrades.

comps.name: Akali Reroll
tips: Look for an econ engine: Primordian > Timebreaker. Slam items for Akali. Use Primordian to generate Akalis.
Level to 6 and roll for Akali 3 with 3 Primordian still in. Always play 5 NOVA if you higroll early Kindred. Once you finish Akali / tank items, make Kindred or Yi items.
Finish your 3* and push levels for 5 NOVA. Tank Gragas 3 until you find Maokai 3. Look for Yi 2 or Kindred 2 as your duo carry.

comps.name: KIZZ
tips: Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Rogues to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Kaisa / Fizz.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Karma.

comps.name: Lulu MF
tips: Ideally open with early Lulu to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for Lulu / tank.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* Lulu and at least 1 tank. You should be hitting end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment.

comps.name: Replicator MF Reroll
tips: Ideally open with one of the 3-cost Conduits to itemize. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Primordian. Slam items for MF / Riven.
If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for Bard / Conduit.

comps.name: Jhin 9-5
tips: Play for win streak, ideally with Timebreaker but that will be rare because units are weaker on average. Slam items aggressively.
If win streaking, prioritize playing strongest board over greeding econ traits. Upgraded 2 and 3 costs are often better than 1* high tier units here.
If very healthy, go to 8 and roll minimally to preserve HP / sac to level 9. If mid HP, roll a good amount to stabilize before pushing to 9 in Stage 5+.

comps.name: LeBlanc Karma: Bronze for Life
tips: Play around early Arbiters with Zoe as the item holder. You can also play around Teemo and Nasus too. Slam items for Leblanc > Tank.
Look for 4 Vanguard and 3 Shepherd as your core. Leblanc 1 is strong and can immediately be played if you high roll her early.
Level to 8 and roll for Leblanc Karma and frontline. If you hit Nunu 2 with good Arbiter play Vanguard version until you can find Rammus 2 and Bard. Rhaast on 9,

comps.name: Anima Viktor
tips: Ideally open with Anima to begin lose streak. Be careful about slamming items and being too strong. Position poorly if needed to guarantee losses.
Aim for 300-400 minimum cash out. Level to 7 and roll for 2* 3 costs. Aim to stabilize with at least 2 lives. If you need time to transition, roll during PvE rounds.
Slow roll for 3* 3 cost. You should be hitting one by end of Stage 4. If you think you can't hit, take an econ augment. Once done, level to 8 for any 5 cost.
